tutorial.slide1_desc: The goal of the game is to guide the light from the <1>Light Source</1> to the <3>Crystal</3>.
tutorial.slide2_desc: You can change their angles by clicking on the mirrors and dragging the <1>control wheel</1> around them.
tutorial.slide2_note: Note: You can carry mirrors with a box pattern in the middle to empty spaces by holding them down.
tutorial.slide3_desc: Blue mirrors have a <1>red barrier</1> where they face the crystal. Only the <3>Neon Green</3> mirror can provide light to the crystal!
tutorial.slide3_note: Always try to direct the light to the green mirror.

hint.watch_ad: Watch an ad to earn a hint
hint.active: Hint active! Rotate the highlighted mirror...

daily.title: Daily Puzzle
daily.played: Already played today! Come back tomorrow.
daily.completed_desc: You've solved today's crystal mystery. Come back tomorrow for a new secret.
